prompt: Anh đang định launch khóa học 'Bán Hàng Trên Shopee Cho Người Mới' (8 tuần, video course tiếng Việt, 40 module). Pain/Gain provided. Khách target: phụ nữ 25-40 ở TP HCM/HN đi làm văn phòng muốn bán part-time 15-30M/tháng. Em đề xuất bonus giúp anh nhé.

assertions.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
offer.md contains 'Anchor' section with segment + dream outcome + top 3 pains + top 3 gains
offer.md contains Value Equation scoring table with 4 levers (Dream Outcome, Perceived Likelihood, Time Delay, Effort & Sacrifice) — both baseline AND after-stack scores
Core offer name is benefit-driven with specific timeframe + outcome (not generic 'Khóa Học Shopee')
Bonus stack covers at least 3 of 4 Hormozi categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Each bonus has VND value with justification.
Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
No price ends with digit 4 (Vietnamese superstition)
Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x (Hormozi credibility rule)
Guarantee duration ≥ 60 days OR conditional/service-based (suitable for VN digital product market)
Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout (no English placeholder)
conversion-copy.md has: H1 headline + subheadline + primary CTA + risk reversal one-liner blocks (paste-ready)
offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (array), guarantee, urgency, pricing (with tiers array), conversion_copy
Urgency block has a legitimate reason (cohort capacity, real deadline, founding member, NOT fake countdown)
